message:
fix(raptorq,lyapunov): correct GF(256) exponent reduction and weight validation

- Fix HDPC matrix Vandermonde/GAMMA exponent truncation: `& 0xFF` incorrectly
  masks to 256 values, but alpha has multiplicative order 255 in GF(256).
  Change to `% 255` so alpha^i is correct for i >= 255 (latent bug for K > 65025).
- Fix PotentialWeights::is_valid() to reject f64::INFINITY, which would produce
  NaN in potential function computations.
- Add mul_slice_large_inputs test to exercise the mul_with_table_wide hot path
  (>= 64 bytes), which previously had no test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
